claim: Mu 2013, omuzannyi w'eby'obusuubuzi era omulabirizi wa TV eya bulijjo, Donald Trump yagamba nti: "Okukomya gavumenti kujja olw'obutaba na buyinza bwa pulezidenti, kubanga ebizibu bitandika ku ntikko era bigwanidde okugonjoolwa ku ntikko.
evidence: Ku bikwata ku muwendo guno, Trump lumu yagamba ebigambo ebituufu mu lugero olw'okubiri olw'ebigambo ebyo. Nsaba, ebizibu bitandika ku ntikko era bigwanidde okugonjoolebwa ku ntikko. Okuyimirirwa kitegeeza nti pulezidenti wa maanyi". Okusinziira ku biwandiiko bya Trump n'ebitundu ebirimu ebigambo ebyo, Pulezidenti eyagamba nti yali akkiriziganya mu kiseera ky'okuyimirirwa kwa Pulezidenti Barack Obama mu mwaka gwa 2025  yafulumya ebigambo bino ennaku ntono nga tebinnatuuka gavumenti okuyimirirwa mu kiseera ky'obufuzi bwa Pulezidenti Barack Obama mu 2013.

claim: Ennyanjula y'ekitongole ky'ebyenjigiriza ku biva mu SPM
evidence: Ekitabo ekikozeseddwa mu lulimi Olumaleesi, ekirina omutwe "Media statement: Malaysian Certificate of Education (SPM) results", kyagabanyiziddwa ku Facebook nga Apuli 1. Ekitabo ekyo kirimu obusaale bwa Malaysi era kirabika kifulumizibwa Minisitule y'Eby'enjigiriza, nga kiwa abavudde ku bibala ebisingayo obulungi mu kibuuzo kya SPM ekyabangawo mu ggwanga - ekiragibwa ku bayizi b'essomero ly'okusatu - nga kivudde ku langi. Ekitabo ekyo kigamba nti 31,43 ku buli kikumi ky'abayizi b'omu Malaysi, 88.21 ku buli kikumi ky'abayizi b'omu China, ne 81.48 ku buli kikumi ky'abayizi b'omu India bafunye ebibala ebisingayo obulungi. claim: "Abantu obukadde 12.4 mu South Africa tebalina mulimu".  Mmusi Maimane
evidence: Twakebera ebitundu bitaano ebya Pulezidenti ebikwata ku by'enfuna, era byonna byali bituufu. Ramaphosa yali ku ssente bwe yafuna okukulaakulana okw'omubiri, ensi eyalina omuwendo gw'eby'enfuna ogusingawo mu myaka 20, era n'ebisale by'ensimbi n'eby'ensimbi nga bikendeera. Ebitundu bitaano eby'obutabaako ky'akolawo ab'ekibiina kyonna mu by'obufuzi byali bituufu oba kumpi. John Steenhuisen ow'ekibiina kya Democratic Alliance yali mutuufu nti obutabaako ky'akolawo kyali ku ntikko y'emyaka etaano, naye banne baagamba nti kino kyali kikyaleka abantu ba South Africa obukadde 12.4 nga tebakola mulimu, nga muno mwe muli n'abantu ab'omuzira mu South Africa 35.8 ku buli kikumi. Ab'ekibiina kya UMkhonto weSizwe baali beeyisizza ku by'okuba nti abantu ba South Africa beeyongedde okukula mangu okusinga bwe kyali kibadde era nga beekozesa ennyumba ezitaliimu emmere, nga ne kiviirako abantu baabwe okuba abatasinziira.

claim: Ebitundu bya Stanley tumblers birimu omuzira omuli omuzira ogusobola okuleeta obuwuka bw'omuzira mu kiseera ky'okukozesa obulungi.
evidence: Okuviira ddala ku ntandikwa y'omwaka 2024, ebibuuzo ku mikutu gy'eby'empuliziganya byatuuse ku kubeerawo kwa bbomu eyitibwa Stanley tumblers, naddala nga kyogera ku butonde bwa bbomu eyitibwa Stanley, nga kino kiviiriddeko abantu okuwuliziganya ku butonde bw'ekizigo n'engeri gye kizingiramu. Ekituufu kye tukebera kiraga nti wadde ng'ebbomu bya Stanley birimu ebitundu bitono eby'ebbala mu ngeri gye bikolaamu, okwekebera kulaga nti ebitundu by'ebbala byayo biyinza okuba eby'akabi.

claim: Nga Gavana wa Michigan Gretchen Whitmer afuga, amaka g'abantu abatono nnyo ge gali mu bwavu okusinga g'ali mu ggye lye.
evidence: Gavana Gretchen Whitmer, omukulembeze w'eggwanga eyava mu kibiina ky'Abademukatuuki, gye buvuddeko awo yawandiika ku ebyo bye yali akoze ng'ayingira omwaka gwe ogw'okusembayo ng'akulembera Michigan. "Endowooza yaffe etuleetedde okufuna ebibala ebyewuunyisa", Whitmer bwe yawandiika mu kiwandiiko kye yawandiika ku Feb. 2 Substack. "Ebiribwa ebituuka ku myaka gya K, ku yunivasite y'omu kitundu, n'eby'amasomero biweebwa abantu bonna. Ab'omu maka agatali bumu ababeera mu bwavu". Ebigambo bye biraga nti abantu b'omu Michigan beeraliikirivu olw'okuba balina ssente entono, era nti ekyo kiyinza okuba ensonga enkulu eri abalonzi mu kulonda okw'omuddukanya, nga mw'otwalidde n'okulwana mu Sseneti y'Amerika mu Michigan.

claim: Macy's yali egenda kuggyamu embaga ey'okusiima Katonda mu kibuga New York mu 2025 kubanga Meeya Zohran Mamdani eyali afugiddwa yali ayagala okubalirira bbo eyabanga akuŋŋaanya obuwumbi 10 bw'obukadde bwa doola okussaawo Fifth Avenue.
evidence: Oluvannyuma lwa Zohran Mamdani okuwangula okulonda kwa New York City mu November 2025, amawulire gaatandika okusaasaana ku Intaneeti nti Macy's yali avunaanya akalulu k'omwaka aka Thanksgiving olw'okuba omubaka omuto yali ayagala okubalirira bbo akawunta z'amadola obukadde 10 bakozese Fifth Avenue. Ng'ekyokulabirako, ku mukutu gwa Facebook ogwa America's Last Line of Defense (ALLOD) abantu baawandiika ebigambo ebiwandiikiddwa nga (bikozeseddwa): Abantu b'omu New York bejjusa olw'okuba Macy's yaalangirira nti empisa z'omwaka 125 ez'okusiima enkolo z'omwaka ogwaliwo. "Majiri omuto ayagala tusasulire obukadde 10 okupangisa 5th Avenue okumala essaawa ssatu", Pulezidenti wa Macy Joseph A. Barron bwe yategeezezza, "Tusaanidde okuvuma".

evidence: Ekitundu kino kigamba nti mu kiseera kya Ssaabalamuzi D. Y. Chandrachud, kkooti enkulu yazzaawo ekiragiro kyaayo okuva ku 'Satyameva Jayate' okutuuka ku 'Yato Dharmastato Jayah.' Gavai avuddeyo avuddeyo okuzzaawo ekiragiro kya Ssaabalamuzi Omukulu ekyalimu ekiragiro kya 'Satyameva Jayate' ( wano, wano, wano) mu kitundu kino, ka tulabe ensonga lwaki ekiragiro kino kyawandiikibwa.

claim: Etteeka erikwata ku kweggyamu abantu b'omu Amerika eddembe ly'okuwandiisa abantu baabwe ku bwabo bokka, ekintu abantu 5% bokka kye bakola leero".
evidence: Ab'ekibiina ky'Abademokrate balwana nnyo n'etteeka erya Safeguard American Voter Eligibility Act, oba SAVE America Act, eryawagirwa aba Republican, nga ligamba nti lijja kutandika okulemesa abantu aba Amerika okwewandiisa oba okuvuganya. Nga Sseneti etandika okuvuganya ku tteeka lino nga March 17, Omukulembeze w'ab'ekibiina ky'Abadeemokrate mu Sseneti Chuck Schumer, D.N.Y., yakiraga nti amateeka ago gajja kuleetawo ebizibu. Etteeka lino "lijja kukaka abantu aba Amerika okwewandiisa bokka mu maaso, ekintu kyokka nga 5% ku bantu aba Amerika kye bakola leero", bwe yagamba bannamawulire. Schumer agamba nti etteeka lino lijja kwetaagisa obujulizi bwa bukadde obw'obutuuze okuwandiisa abantu mu maaso okusobola okuwagira akalulu. Naye ye tekyamu ku bikwata ku bitundu by'abantu abawandiisa abantu mu maaso, okusinziira ku kunoonyereza okwakolebwa mu gavumenti.

claim: Mu bbaluwa gye yawandiikira munne Ghislaine Maxwell eyafulumizibwa akakiiko k'ab'oluganda ak'omu nju ey'ab'oluganda mu Noovemba 2025, omwonoonyi ow'ebikolwa eby'obugwenyufu Jeffrey Epstein yayita Pulezidenti wa Amerika Donald Trump "embwa etannayoganga" era n'agamba nti Trump yamala essaawa eziwerako ng'ali yekka n'omu ku abo abaamutunda mu maka ga Epstein.
evidence: Ku bikwata ku mpisa eno, ebyogerwa byagenda ku Intaneeti mu Noovemba 2025 nti mu kusasulira obubaka obuli mu bbaluwa wakati w'omumenyi w'amateeka Jeffrey Epstein ne munnamateeka gwe Ghislaine Maxwell, Epstein yalaga nti Pulezidenti wa Amerika Donald Trump yali "mbwa ataaliko kye yeeyogedde" era nti Pulezidenti "amala essaawa nnyingi" mu maka ga Epstein ng'ali wamu n'omugenzi gwe yali asuuliddwa.

claim: Akakiiko k'omupiira ak'ensi yonna (ICC) kaakuŋŋaanyizza ekiragiro ekiraga nti akakiiko k'omupiira ak'omu Pakistan kaagaanyizibwako omwaka gumu.
evidence: Ekitongole kya Cricket International Council (ICC) kyafulumizza ekiteeso ekiregerezza nti ekibinja kya Pakistan kijja kuba tekirina kyakugatta ku mpaka ezisooka ez'omwaka ogujja. (Archive Link) "Ekitongole" kino kyafulumiziddwa nnyo nga waliwo omukolo ogujja okubaawo mu mpaka za T20 World Cup 2026, nga Pakistan egenda okuvuganya ne India mu kibinja A mu wiiki ejja e Colombo. Emabegako, Pakistan yali yalagidde nti terina kugenda ku mpaka za Cricket ya February 15 ez'enjawulo ez'ensi yonna, wadde nga gavumenti yaggyawo okuvuganya kwa ttiimu y'eggwanga mu mpaka ezisigaddewo nga zitandika nga Febwali 7. (Fact) Tetufunye mawulire ga mawulire gaali ga mazima agalaga nti ICC egenda kugatta ku Pakistan okumala omwaka gumu. Newschecker yeetegereza ku mukutu gwa Facebook, ku mukutu gwa Instagram, ne ku mukutu gwa X ogwa International Cricket Council (ICC) era n'asanga nga tewali kintu kyonna ekikakasa nti ekibinja ku ntikko kya Cricket kya Pakistan.

claim: Ekire kya Sheld Cloud ekiriko akabenje ku Haridwar nga December 18, 2025.
evidence: Vishvas News mu kunoonyereza kwayo yazuula nti vidiyo ey'obulabe ey'ekireeva mu Haridwar si yaakyo, wabula ya July 2023. Vishvas News ekutte nti yalabikira ku Haridwar nga December 18, 2025.

claim: Oluvannyuma lwa Ssaabawandiisi w'eby'Eby'obuyinza Pete Hegseth okugoba John Harrison, akulira ekitongole kya Navy ekya Navy Staff mu Okitobba 2025, ab'obuyinza baamukwata ku misango gy'okwerekereza.
evidence: Ng'ekyokulabirako, omukugu ku X yatumizza ebigambo bino: Abavunuzi ba Navy JAG ku Lwokutaano baakwata omukozi wa Navy ku nnyumba ye ey'ekitiibwa okumpi n'e Washington Naval Yard nga wayiseewo essaawa ntono oluvannyuma lwa Ssaabawandiisi w'Eby'Emirembe Pete Hegseth okumugoba olw'obutaba na buyinza, nga Real Raw News bwe yayiga. claim: Ekibinja ky'abaminsani ab'omu Cambodia baasiima nnyo Pulezidenti wa Amerika Donald Trump mu kiseera ky'omwaka gwa 2025 olw'okuggyawo entalo wakati wa Cambodia ne Thailand.

Omusango guno ogwabadde gutambula ku Intaneeti okuva mu nkomerero ya Noovemba 2025, gwasobose oluvannyuma lw'omuntu gwe bagamba nti ye Horyn okulabikira mu kitundu ekimu ku firimu z'ekyama ez'ekyama "Jimmy Kimmel Live". Kimmel yakozesa ebigambo ebiraga nti ye yali mu linnya lya Horyn ("I wanna be whorin'") ng'entandikawo ekitundu ekiraga abantu abalala "abalina enkizo" abalina amannya. Ekitundu kino kisobola okulabikira ku YouTube nga ekitundu ekikwata ku nsonga eno kitandika ku ssaawa 14:00 ez'ekiro.

claim: Mu ssaza lya Edo mu Nigeria, ebbula ly'emirimu liri 19%.
evidence: Obusozi mu Edo State bwava ku 25.1 ku buli kikumi mu katundu ak'okusatu aka 2018 ne buva ku 19 ku buli kikumi mu katundu ak'okubiri aka 2020, nga bwe kiragibwa mu kivvulu kya Nigeria Bureau of Statistics (NBS). Obusozi bwa 6,1 ku buli kikumi bwagambibwa nti bwava ku mulimu gw'okufuna emirimu mu gavumenti ya Gavana Godwin Obaseki, ey'ekitongole ky'okufuna emirimu, Edo State Skills Development Agency (EdoJobs) gye kigambibwa nti kyateeka emirimu egisukka mu 170,000 okuyitira mu nteekateeka ez'obuvunaanyizibwa mu myaka esatu n'ekitundu egiyise. Okusinziira ku alipoota y'ekitundu, Edo State erina ebitundu ebitonotono ennyo mu kitundu kya South South South, nga kizingiramu ebibiina ebirala bitaano eby'eby'obugagga mu by'enfuna z'amafuta mu kitundu.  Obusozi mu bitundu by'omu South South South South bwe bw'obwo bwe bw'obwo: Akwa-I 45.2%; Baybom 27.8%; 31.6%; 40.3%, Rivers Delta 19

claim: Bazadde ba First Lady Melania Trump bajja mu Amerika okuyitira mu bukuumi obukolebwa ab'omu maka, era obuyitibwa "chain migration".
evidence: Okuva ku bufuzi bwa Pulezidenti Donald Trump, bangi baalowooza ku mbeera y'abazadde ba Melania Trump gye baalimu mu nsi endala n'engeri gye baajja mu Amerika. Ebiwandiiko bingi ku Intaneeti byalaganga nti baatuuka mu nsi eyo nga bayita mu nkola Trump ye yeegomba era n'agezaako okuziyiza. Mu vidiyo eyafulumizibwa mu YouTube eya Jjulaayi 2025, Donald Trump yeeyambisa mu ngeri eno: Donald Trump yazimba ekikolwa eky'obukambwe ku by'okuyingira mu nsi endala - ebigo, okuggya mu nsi endala, n'okwambala abantu. Naye mu buwambe, yakozesa "ennyonyi y'obubudamu" gye yayita "ddooka" okuggya mu nsi endala ng'ayita mu maka ge, ate ng'abaana be ab'omu langi ey'ebika eby'enjawulo baamuggya mu bazadde baabwe ne bamusiba mu bigo. Mu kiseera kya gavumenti ye eyasooka, Trump yagezaako okuziyiza ekikolwa ekiyitibwa "okuvvuunuka ebikolwa eby'obutabanguko", ng'agamba nti kyetaagisa obukuumi bwa ggwanga.

claim: China egenda kugamba nti egenda kugamba nti Samsung esobola okuggyawo programu z'eby'okulondoola za Isirayiri ez'obutaggibwawo.
evidence: Ebiwandiiko bya Social Media Posts bigamba nti "China eteekateeka okugaana essimu za Samsung olw'okuba ziri mu "basuubuzi ab'omu Isirayiri abatakosebwamu", era nti China era egobera Samsung, Motorola, Apple, ne Google Pixel olw'ensonga z'obukuumi. Kyokka, twasanga ng'ekyo tekikyamu. Social Media Posts zigamba nti "China eteekateeka okugaana essimu za Samsung olw'okuba ziri mu 'basuubuzi ab'omu Isirayiri abatakosebwamu,'" era abamu bagamba nti kizingiramu okugaana okusuubula essimu ez'omu nsi.

claim: Akatabo ak'obufuzi bwa Ontario, Canada, kaaliko omubaka omwonoonyi eyafulumya omutwe gwa Pulezidenti Ronald Reagan nga Apuli 25, 1987, nga bw'ayogera ku by'entalo.
evidence: Oluvannyuma lwa gavumenti y'ekitundu kya Canada ekya Ontario okulangirira okulangirira okulwanyisa omusolo nga kwogera ku nteekateeka y'eby'obusuubuzi mu Amerika, Pulezidenti Donald Trump yagamba nti Amerika egenda kuggalawo entalo z'eby'obusuubuzi ne muliraanwa we ow'ebukiikakkono. Mu kiwandiiko ekya Truth Social ekyafulumizibwa nga 23 Okitobba, Trump yayogera ku bigambo bya Ronald Reagan Presidential Foundation and Institute. Trump yawandiika nti, "Ekitongole kya Ronald Reagan kyategeezezza nti Canada kyakozesa mu ngeri ey'obukuusa ekikkulumu, ekiraga nti Ronald Reagan ayogera bubi ku misolo". Ekitongole kya Ronald Reagan Presidential Foundation and Institute kye kitongole ekikola ku by'obusuubuzi ekisangibwa mu Simi Valley, California, ekyalimu Reagan ekiteekateeka eky'okuteekawo obusika bwe n'emisingi gye. Ekitongole kya Reagan kyagamba nti ekikolero kya Radio Reagan eya April 25, 1987, kyaliko "emisolo egy'okuwuliriza n'okuwuliriza" era "kyogera ku ky'omulabiri wa Radio ya Pulezidenti.

claim: Mu kiseera kya Gov. Hochuls, wabaddewo obumenyi bw'amateeka bungi mu nguudo zaffe.
evidence: Omukulembeze w'ekibiina ekikulu ekya Republican, Kathy Hochul, yagamba nti, "ebikolwa bya Gavumenti byaffe bya butaba bya bwenkanya" oluvannyuma lw'okukyalira Gavumenti ya New York. "Ebintu byokka abantu b'omu New York bye balina okulaga okuva ku bufuzi bwe kwe kweyongerayo kw'ebbeeyi, okwongera ku ssente ze bakozesa mu kwonoona ssente, okugaziya ku ssente z'obwesomesa, n'obumenyi bw'amateeka mu nguudo zaffe", Robert Ortt, omukulembeze w'ab'ab'ekibiina ekinene mu Sseneti, mu kitundu ekiyitibwa North Tonawanda. Obumenyi bw'amateeka bweyongera mu kiseera kya kaweefube ono bwali buwandiikiddwa bulungi, naye twalowooza obanga ebyo Ortt bye yayogera nti "bwongedde obumenyi bw'amateeka mu nguudo zaffe" okuva nga Hochul yafuuka gavana nga Agusito 24, 2021, bituufu.
